name: Root Café

seo.title: Root Café — Farm-to-Table Breakfast & Lunch in SoMa Little Rock | Metro Little Rock
seo.description: Root Café is South Main's breakfast and lunch anchor — a farm-to-table café that sources from Arkansas farms and runs a community-first dining room beloved by the neighborhood.

description: Root Café anchors the southern end of the South Main Creative Corridor with a menu built around relationships with Arkansas farms. The breakfast and lunch service changes with the season — not as a marketing posture but because that's what's ready. Biscuits, eggs, grain bowls, and sandwiches are all made with the same seriousness about sourcing. The dining room is community-minded in a genuine way: a pay-what-you-can model for customers who need it, a community board full of local events, and staff who know the regulars by name. Saturday and Sunday brunch lines form before the doors open; weekday breakfast is more relaxed and worth the detour if you're nearby.

image.alt: Root Café dining room on South Main in Little Rock
